codeReview.summary: The fix satisfies the feature contract: `Dialog.vue` now generates a stable heading id, binds `aria-labelledby` whenever a title prop or title slot is present, and exposes that id to title-slot consumers so slotted dialogs receive an accessible name without falling back to `aria-label`. The focused regression test covers both the built-in heading path and the slotted-heading path, and I did not find any blocking correctness issues in scope.

summary: Pass: the rerun closes the dialog accessibility gap by wiring `aria-labelledby` to a generated title id for both prop-based and slotted titles, with matching regression coverage in `Dialog.test.ts`.
